title: Highly Cryptic Operational Language
summary: Drop #8 contained brief and highly ambiguous operational-style language. The lack of concrete details made later interpretations highly flexible.
raw_text:
Alice & Wonderland.
How far down the rabbit hole do you want to go?
There is no escaping this.
Q

lines.text: How far down the rabbit hole do you want to go?
lines.fact: The phrase is metaphorical and references Alice in Wonderland imagery.
lines.theory: Followers interpreted this as encouragement to independently research hidden political or institutional information.
lines.context: Rabbit hole terminology became a defining part of internet conspiracy culture prior to and during QAnon.
lines.questions: Does the framing encourage open-ended interpretation without standards of evidence?
